category_sources: source_facts.description says Ruby client and CLI for GitLab API; official site says Ruby wrapper and CLI for GitLab API.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gitlab-gem; official homepage describes the project as a GitLab Ruby wrapper and CLI.
docs_sources: Official homepage provides installation, configuration, usage, CLI, and examples; it links to RubyDoc as documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/NARKOZ/gitlab, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage identify this as a Ruby GitLab API wrapper with CLI support.
